channel.title: Bloomberg Green Global
channel.description: Últimos artigos de Bloomberg Green Global

item.title: China’s Net Zero Strategy Relies on an Unlikely Tool: Lots of Coal
item.description: The central government sees coal as an essential bridge to a clean-energy future. Some regions are motivated to extend its use as long as possible.
item.dc:creator: Autor não encontrado

item.title: NYC’s Extreme Heat Threatens Holiday Weekend Plans With 110F Real Feel
item.description: A dangerous heat wave that is trapped over New York City is also trapping people in the city.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Nix, Stella Mackler, Lauren Rosenthal

item.title: Engie Wind Farm Damaged by Hurricane-Force Gale in South Dakota
item.description: Engie North America is assessing the damage from hurricane-force winds that tore through a South Dakota wind farm earlier this week, damaging more than 20 of the site’s 92 turbines.
item.dc:creator: Will Wade, Francois de Beaupuy

item.title: US Moves to Halt Energy Savings Requirements Lambasted by Trump
item.description: The Trump administration is moving to halt mandatory energy conservation standards for appliances ranging from refrigerators to washing machines, taking aim at some restrictions that have been criticized by the president himself.
item.dc:creator: Ari Natter

item.title: There’s an AI-Sized Hole in Big Tech’s Plans to Cut Emissions
item.description: Amazon and Google saw their greenhouse gas emissions jump as they struggled to balance climate goals with growing data-center power demand.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Raimonde, Spencer Soper, Chris Rovzar

item.title: Flood Re to Cut Insurance Payouts to Richest UK Households
item.description: The UK’s flood insurer of last resort is unfairly favoring wealthier households and will be reformed to reduce the burden of multimillion-pound payouts, the government said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Rudgard

item.title: Ivory Coast, Ghana Floods Claim 74 Lives as Rains Intensify
item.description: Heavy rains have left at least 74 people dead in Ivory Coast and Ghana over the past few days, with the worst downpour occurring Sunday and Monday.
item.dc:creator: Kamailoudini Tagba

item.title: The Future of Sport on an Overheating Planet
item.description: What is climate change doing to sport? And — given the emissions impact of some big events — what is sport doing to climate change?
item.dc:creator: Akshat Rathi, Oscar Boyd

item.title: Mekong Capital Starts Climate-Focused Fund Backed by Green Group
item.description: Vietnam’s Mekong Capital Ltd. is launching a climate-focused private equity fund with a $50 million anchor investment from the Green Climate Fund.
item.dc:creator: Giang Nguyen

item.title: New York Power Prices Skyrocket as Heat Burdens US Grids
item.description: Power prices from New York to Virginia are surging as sweltering heat threatens to overwhelm US grids and upend travel for the Independence Day holiday.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Rosenthal, John Ainger, Nacha Cattan
